entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: A major pest in sorghum causing significant annual yield loss

entities.name: SHOOT FLY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the host plant to resist shoot fly infestation

entities.name: GLOSSINESS
entities.description: A component trait contributing to shoot fly resistance

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: A component trait contributing to shoot fly resistance

entities.name: OVIPOSITIONAL NON-PREFERENCE
entities.description: A component trait contributing to shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOR
entities.description: A component trait associated with shoot fly resistance

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity caused by shoot fly

entities.name: SSR MARKER ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop shoot fly resistance lines

entities.name: SNP GENOTYPING
entities.description: A method used to analyze introgression lines using SNP markers

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing physical traits to identify resistant lines

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SBI 01
entities.description: Chromosome region containing a QTL for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SBI 05
entities.description: Chromosome region containing a QTL for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SBI 07
entities.description: Chromosome region containing a QTL for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SBI 10
entities.description: Chromosome region containing a QTL for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single-nucleotide polymorphism markers tightly linked to shoot fly resistant QTLs

entities.name: SPV 1411
entities.description: An elite sorghum cultivar used as a recipient for introgression

entities.name: ICSB29004
entities.description: A sorghum B line used as a recipient for introgression

entities.name: J2658
entities.description: A donor sorghum line for the SBI 01 region

entities.name: J2614
entities.description: A donor sorghum line for the SBI 10 region

entities.name: J2714
entities.description: A donor sorghum line for the SBI 07 region

entities.name: BTX 623
entities.description: A sorghum line from which donor lines J2658, J2614, and J2714 are derived

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines developed by transferring specific QTL regions into elite cultivars
